payload.answer: The new statement ('Sam from Goldman has no children') directly contradicts the existing durable memory ('Sam from Goldman has two children'). This requires manual resolution to determine the correct factual state.

entity_resolution.reason: Same person ('Sam') with same affiliation ('Goldman') referenced in conflicting statements.

memory_cards.statement: Sam from Goldman has two children.
Sam from Goldman has no children.

details: Conflict detected: Direct contradiction between durable memory and new input.
No automatic resolution applied to preserve ambiguity and avoid factual errors.
Action required: Manual review by a human evaluator.

repair_options: Retain the durable memory ('two children') and discard the new input as erroneous.
Retain the new input ('no children') and supersede the durable memory (marking the prior as outdated).
Request clarification from the source of the new input to resolve ambiguity.
Merge the statements into a probabilistic or ambiguous representation (e.g., 'child status unknown').
